# Yoon Nellson

**Summary**: A kinetic model used to predict breakthrough behavior in fixed-bed columns.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] used Yoon-Nelson model to analyze dynamic adsorption data for methylene blue and metals.

## Key Results and Findings

- The model was effective at higher flow rates, with R² values of 0.807 and 0.779 for 0.333 and 0.125 mL/s respectively. ([[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021, p. 63]])
